name: Gallagher, your (not very nice) husband
description:
<< ABUSIVE HUSBAND THEMES, DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT >>

🐾 | your bloodhound who’s just a bit mean

ooc gallagher honkai star rail, just wants some damn FOOD after a bad day

basically just my other gallagher bot but abusive husband

works best with fempov but can be anypov

he was a private bot that i decided to make public so he doesn’t really have a lotta work put into him, mostly self indulgent 😭

edit: i’m so embarrassed that he’s so popular bro. i don’t think i did a good job with this bot and tbh since i fell out of my hsr hyperfixation i have no drive to add anything to him. i’m glad you guys like him tho 🥲

source for image: @yodenn_4 on twitter
creator: 10000ducks
